comments.author: codex
comments.body:
Closed `BIG-PAR-214` after landing lease-safety hardening for shared queue coordination.

What changed:
- Lease renewals now fail closed after expiry across queue backends; sqlite renew requires the lease to still be valid at renewal time and can return `ErrLeaseExpired`.
- Worker runtime treats lease loss as a first-class outcome (cancels execution and requeues with `LastTransition=\"lease.lost\"`, tracking renewal failures and lost runs).
- Cancelled+leased runs are purged after lease expiry across backends to avoid stuck cancelled work if a worker dies.
- Prometheus counters exported for lease renewal failures and lease-lost runs.

Validation:
- `cd bigclaw-go && go test ./...` -> ok
- `bash scripts/ops/bigclawctl github-sync status --json` -> local SHA `469cb3b79698e3596096fc79d46132d4fc1dff02` matches remote SHA `469cb3b79698e3596096fc79d46132d4fc1dff02` with `status: ok`, `synced: true`, `pushed: true`
- `git log -1 --stat` -> captured for commit `469cb3b79698e3596096fc79d46132d4fc1dff02`

Key commits:
- `9d3ecffa7d7f343a83376b64662556c79f71d12e`
- `5edec4a88680237c9989db81a1f0c85d1159057a`
- `d6feb340081be417b41575074c1b0ace0d6b218c`
- merge `origin/main`: `60a929681a026c978b67c3db43ba308d1ffcc8ea`

PR URL: https://github.com/OpenAGIs/BigClaw/pull/147.

issues.description: Harden shared-queue coordination by failing lease renewals closed after expiry, treating lease loss as an explicit worker runtime outcome, purging cancelled runs after lease expiry, and exporting lease-loss Prometheus counters.
issues.title: Shared-queue coordination and lease-safety hardening

comments.author: codex
comments.body:
Closed `BIG-PAR-241` after hardening repo-native local tracker mutations against overlapping writers.

What changed:
- `bigclaw-go/internal/refill/local_store.go` now acquires a bounded-retry `local-issues.json.lock`, reloads the latest on-disk tracker state inside the lock, and only then applies create/state/comment mutations before rewriting the store.
- `bigclaw-go/internal/refill/local_store_test.go` now covers stale-snapshot comment preservation and transient lock-file retry behavior.

issues.description: Add a BigClaw policy slice for ClawHost model-provider configuration and app-level defaults so provider drift, entitlement policy, and rollout safety can be audited and applied across multiple tenants and bot groups in parallel. This is grounded in ClawHost's support for multiple AI providers and per-app multi-tenant bot ownership.
issues.title: Add ClawHost provider defaults and tenant policy surfaces
